summary: Verified the ScrollToTop fix for Oak & Iron portfolio. All 4 scroll-reset scenarios FAILED. Root cause: ScrollToTop is imported in /app/frontend/src/App.js (line 6) but never rendered as a JSX element inside <BrowserRouter>. The component must be added as <ScrollToTop /> above <Navbar /> for the useEffect on pathname to run.
passed: Portfolio cards present (5 found) and clickable to detail pages

failed.issue: After scrolling Home to bottom (scrollY=637) and clicking PORTFOLIO nav link, /portfolio loads with scrollY=637 (expected 0).
From /portfolio scrolled to bottom (scrollY=2890), clicking a card opens /portfolio/arched-picture-frame with scrollY=445 (expected 0).
From detail page scrolled to 1027, clicking CONTACT nav, /contact loads with scrollY=1027 (expected 0).
From /contact scrolled to 1228, clicking HOME nav, / loads with scrollY=637 (expected 0).

ScrollToTop component is imported at line 6 of /app/frontend/src/App.js but is NOT rendered anywhere inside the BrowserRouter. The JSX tree only contains <Navbar />, <main><Routes>...</Routes></main>, <Footer />, <Toaster />.

action_items:
In /app/frontend/src/App.js, render the ScrollToTop component inside <BrowserRouter> above <Navbar />. Example:
  <BrowserRouter>
    <ScrollToTop />
    <Navbar />
    ...
  </BrowserRouter>
After the fix, re-run all 4 navigation scenarios to confirm window.scrollY === 0 on each route change.
